name: Medically Necessary Leave of Absence for Students

eligibility.description: Dependent students suffering from a serious illness or injury; requires written certification by a treating physician.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Prevents the termination of health coverage for a dependent child who loses student status at a postsecondary institution due to a medically necessary leave of absence for up to one year.
